highlightCards.title: Linguistic Equity
highlightCards.desc: Recognizing and translating nuanced regional agricultural dialects across Bangladesh, ensuring no farmer is left behind due to terminology.

highlightCards.title: Empirical Multimodality
highlightCards.desc: Combining optical symptom scanning (OCR) with deep conversational queries to deliver immediate, multi-vector agricultural diagnostics.

highlightCards.title: Edge Resilience
highlightCards.desc: Architected to perform in low-bandwidth, rural fields with highly compressed offline models that execute without active internet pipelines.

objectives.title: Technical Frontier
objectives.subtitle: Multi-Modal AI Architecture
objectives.desc: To develop state-of-the-art Bangla Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) coupled with lightweight, agriculture-tuned Large Language Models (LLMs) and Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) for highly accurate knowledge retrieval.

objectives.title: Farmer Empowerment
objectives.subtitle: Natural Conversational Interface
objectives.desc: To bridge the digital literacy divide by creating intuitive, voice-based conversational channels allowing smallholder farmers to seek real-time, expert-level cultivation advice in their native vernacular.

objectives.title: Market & Climate Impact
objectives.subtitle: Dynamic Decision Pipelines
objectives.desc: To integrate local weather datasets, real-time market pricing dynamics, and rapid crop disease OCR identification to guide resilient farming decisions and boost household income.

techDetails.title: Bangla Speech (ASR)
techDetails.desc: Highly-calibrated speech acoustic modeling fine-tuned on diverse rural regional Bangla dialects. Incorporates noise-robust feature layers to filter ambient farming and environmental noise.

techDetails.title: Agriculture LLM
techDetails.desc: An encoder-decoder Transformer framework loaded with validated scientific crop agronomy, soil chemistry, pest vector workflows, and organic cultivation guidelines.

techDetails.title: Knowledge Graphs (GNN)
techDetails.desc: A heterogeneous entity-relationship graph network mapping crop-to-disease, weather-to-risk, and treatment-to-ecology dependencies to prevent model hallucinations.

techDetails.title: Agri-OCR & Leaf Vision
techDetails.desc: Mobile-optimized vision model that recognizes printed seed labels, chemical composition instructions, and detects physical fungal or pest lesions on crop leaves.

timelineQuarters.title: Corpus & Dialect Harvesting
timelineQuarters.desc: Comprehensive speech corpus collection in targeted agro-ecological regions. Initial cataloging of disease vectors and knowledge graph entity construction.

timelineQuarters.title: Acoustic & Agronomy Training
timelineQuarters.desc: Base model training of Bangla dialect ASR. Fine-tuning the localized agriculture-specific LLM parameters with synthetic and curated agrarian datasets.

timelineQuarters.title: Multimodal Synthesis & App Beta
timelineQuarters.desc: Synthesizing ASR and OCR capabilities. Packaging the model into lightweight edge-runtime wrappers. Launching pilot testing with 200 partner smallholders.

timelineQuarters.title: Dynamic Scaling & API Release
timelineQuarters.desc: Full rollout across major agricultural zones. Exposing modular microservices as public research APIs for academic, government, and NGO extension workers.

sdgs.title: No Poverty
sdgs.desc: Reducing vulnerability of smallholders to crop failure and market manipulation by delivering immediate, actionable technical agricultural advice directly to their fields.

sdgs.title: Zero Hunger
sdgs.desc: Improving agricultural productivity and sustainable food production systems through smart pest forecasting, soil health planning, and localized resilient guidelines.

sdgs.title: Decent Work
sdgs.desc: Increasing economic productivity by upgrading manual decision-making with cutting-edge AI guidance, securing smallholder incomes, and supporting resilient rural labor.

sdgs.title: Industry & Innovation
sdgs.desc: Fostering regional academic innovation by developing country-specific, dialect-inclusive AI assets that set a new benchmark for Southern linguistic empowerment.

teamMembers.title: Dr. Nazrul Islam
teamMembers.subtitle: ASSOCIATE PROFESSOR & PRINCIPAL INVESTIGATOR
teamMembers.desc: Academic expert in optical sensors and machine learning at Mawlana Bhashani Science and Technology University (MBSTU). Leads core research and deep learning models.

teamMembers.title: Afsana Akter Mim
teamMembers.subtitle: UNDERGRADUATE RESEARCHER
teamMembers.desc: Final-year B.Sc. student specializing in full-stack MERN/Django application development and machine learning for sentiment analysis.

teamMembers.title: Md. Lutfor Rahaman
teamMembers.subtitle: POST-GRADUATE RESEARCHER
teamMembers.desc: M.Sc. student focusing on Bioinformatics, Explainable AI, and IoT-enabled smart biomedical healthcare ecosystems.

teamMembers.title: Md. Shafi Mahmud
teamMembers.subtitle: UNDERGRADUATE RESEARCHER
teamMembers.desc: Competitive programmer and ML enthusiast with expertise in generative AI, algorithmic data structures, and natural language processing.

teamMembers.title: Sagor Roy
teamMembers.subtitle: UNDERGRADUATE RESEARCHER
teamMembers.desc: Final-year student bridging machine learning and bioinformatics for biomarker discovery and IoT-based smart implementations.

teamMembers.title: Swapnil Saha
teamMembers.subtitle: UNDERGRADUATE RESEARCHER
teamMembers.desc: Final-year B.Sc. student specializing in artificial intelligence, NLP, and bioinformatics-driven research for computational healthcare solutions[cite: 8].

aboutUs.introduction: The Agricultural Language Processing Research Group (ALPRG) at Mawlana Bhashani Science and Technology University (MBSTU) is dedicated to bridging the digital divide in rural farming. We build country-specific, dialect-inclusive AI assets that set a new benchmark for Southern linguistic empowerment and sustainable farming practices.
aboutUs.vision: Empowering every farmer in Bangladesh with state-of-the-art, voice-activated AI interfaces in their local dialects, enabling real-time, expert-level disease diagnostics and sustainable agricultural insights.
aboutUs.mission: To systematically collect rural speech corpora, train high-accuracy bilingual speech models, and design lightweight multi-modal networks capable of rendering critical agronomic help entirely offline at the field edge.

coreValues.title: Linguistic Equity
coreValues.desc: Ensuring no farmer is left behind or misunderstood because of their regional vocabulary, vernacular syntax, or colloquial accent.

coreValues.title: Empirical Excellence
coreValues.desc: Validating every model prediction, advisory prompt, and disease diagnosis against rigorous regional agronomic field trials.

coreValues.title: Offline Accessibility
coreValues.desc: Designing edge-native architectures that render critical, voice-first agricultural help without requiring premium high-bandwidth active internet pipelines.
